title: AOTA Practice Guideline — Hand Therapy Hour Categorization (2024 revision)
body: Older revision predating the 2026-09 instructor eligibility memo. Categorizes modality-only supervision sessions and certain ergonomic assessments as counting toward the 4,000 hour target under prior AOTA guidance. Retained here for historical reference. Superseded by the newer instructor clarification memo in the shared folder dated 2026-09-24. Where the two disagree, defer to the newer memo per the newest-wins judgment rule.
